section_title: Award to be final and binding.-(1) An arbitral award made by an arbitral tribunal
content:
39. Award to be final and binding.-(1) An arbitral award made by an arbitral tribunal
pursuant to an arbitration agreement shall be final and binding on both the parties and on
any persons claiming through or under them.
(2) Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-section (1) the right of a person to challenge
the arbitral award in accordance with the provisions of this Act shall not be affected.

sub_sections.text:
An arbitral award made by an arbitral tribunal
pursuant to an arbitration agreement shall be final and binding on both the parties and on
any persons claiming through or under them.

Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-section (1) the right of a person to challenge
the arbitral award in accordance with the provisions of this Act shall not be affected.
